general-lock-config.title: General Lock Configuration
general-lock-config.permissionWarning: This document's default ownership is not set to 'None'. Players might be able to bypass the lock under certain circumstances. It is recommended to set the default ownership to 'None'.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: This is a security system for the door.

attempts.label: Attempts
attempts.notes: Number of attempts allowed, set to -1 for unlimited.

lockType.label: Lock Type
lockType.notes: The type of lock that will be used to secure the document. Some locks require context to be solved, while others can be solved without any external information.

glow.label: Glow Effect
glow.notes: Enable border and text glow/shadow effects, this will make the theme more suited for sci-fi settings.

primaryColor.label: Primary Color
primaryColor.notes: Some lock types may not use this color. Leave empty to use the lock's default color.

secondaryColor.label: Secondary Color
secondaryColor.notes: Some lock types may not use this color. Leave empty to use the lock's default color.

secondaryFont.label: Secondary Font
secondaryFont.notes: Some lock types may not use this font.

unlockMacro.label: Unlock Macro
unlockMacro.notes: Macro to run when the lock is unlocked. Within the macro you can access 'object' to get the document that was unlocked and 'user' to get the user that unlocked it.

permission.label: On Unlock Permissions
permission.notes: Determines what level of permission a player gets on the document when they unlock it, and wether to give that permission only to the player that unlocked it or to all players. If the document is a Door, this setting will be ignored and the door will be unlocked.

number-lock.name: Number/Glyph
number-lock.description: A lock in the style of a PIN code. The player must enter the correct code to unlock the document. You can replace the numbers with glyphs or images for a more thematic lock.
number-lock.playerInfo: Since this is not a puzzle, the GM will need to provide players with hints or instructions to enter the correct code.

password-lock.name: Password
password-lock.description: A simple password lock. The player must enter the correct password to unlock the document.
password-lock.playerInfo: Since this is not a puzzle, the GM will need to provide players with hints or instructions to enter the correct password.

item-lock.name: Item
item-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to drag and drop one or more items into the correct slots to unlock the document.
item-lock.playerInfo: In order to solve this puzzle, you can ether provide players with context clues or hints to know which items go where, or you can use specific images for the slots that provide the necessary information to guess the correct items.

deleteItems.label: Delete Items
deleteItems.notes: If checked, the items will be deleted from the player's inventory when the lock is unlocked.

switches-lock.name: Switches
switches-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to configure a set of binary switches in the correct position to unlock the document.
switches-lock.playerInfo: Since this is not a puzzle, the GM will need to provide players with hints or instructions to configure the switches correctly.

switchesSolution.label: Switches Configuration
switchesSolution.notes: The solution an configuration of the switches in the format '0110'. Each digit represents a switch, 0 is off and 1 is on. You can have as many switches as you want.

showSwitches.label: Show Switches
showSwitches.notes: Wether to show the switch buttons. If disabled only the on/off state lights will be shown.

cryptex-lock.name: Cryptex
cryptex-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to rotate a set of cylinders to the correct position in order to form the solution. Emojis or glyphs can be used to represent the characters on the cylinders. Different cylinders can have different sets of characters.
cryptex-lock.playerInfo: In order to solve this puzzle, you can ether give players external context clues to know some or all of the characters or, by limiting the amount of characters per cylinder, players can guess the solution by trial and error.

cylinder.label: Cylinder
cylinder.notes: The cylinder that the cryptex uses. Each cylinder character should be separated by a comma.

glyphs.label: Glyphs
glyphs.notes: The glyphs that can be used in the cryptex. Each glyph should be separated by a comma.

celtic-lock.name: Celtic Runes
celtic-lock.description: A Cryptex-style puzzle using Celtic runes. Rotate the cylinders to form the correct runic word.
celtic-lock.playerInfo: Align the correct runes in the center row to unlock.
celtic-lock.title: Celtic Cryptex

chemical-balance-lock.name: Chemical Balance
chemical-balance-lock.description: A puzzle where the player must mix different 'substances' (colors) to achieve a specific target color to unlock.
chemical-balance-lock.playerInfo: Add or remove drops of each substance to achieve the perfect mix.

colorCount.label: Number of Substances
colorCount.notes: Choose how many different substances (2 to 5) are part of the puzzle.

sudoku-lock.name: Sudoku
sudoku-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to solve a sudoku puzzle to unlock the document. The default numbers can be replaced with images or glyphs for a more thematic lock.
sudoku-lock.playerInfo: In order to solve this puzzle, players will need meta knowledge on the sudoku rules, or you can provide them with a hint or instructions on how to solve it.

image-wheel.name: Image Wheel
image-wheel.description: A lock that requires the player to rotate a set of concentric rings to the correct position in order to align the image.
image-wheel.playerInfo: No outside context is needed to solve this puzzle, players can simply rotate the wheels until the image is aligned.

fixed.label: Fixed Wheel
fixed.notes: The wheel which should not be rotated. Where 1 is the outermost wheel.

mastermind-lock.name: Mastermind
mastermind-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to guess the correct combination of colors or letters to unlock the document. Every time the players attempts to unlock, they will receive feedback on how many colors or letters are correct and in the right position. Green indicates a correct color and position, yellow indicates a correct color but wrong position, and red indicates an incorrect color.
mastermind-lock.playerInfo: In order to solve this puzzle, players can use the feedback from previous attempts to make educated guesses on the correct combination. While meta knowledge is not strictly required, it can help players make more informed guesses.

solution.label: Solution
solution.notes: The solution to the mastermind lock. Each color or letter should be separated by a comma. You can use css colors such as 'red' or hex codes such as '#ff0000'.

pipOptions.label: Pegs
pipOptions.notes: The colors or letters that the player can use to guess the solution. Each color or letter should be separated by a comma. You can use css colors such as 'red' or hex codes such as '#ff0000'.

fill-blanks-lock.name: Fill in the Blanks
fill-blanks-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to fill in the blanks in a text to unlock the document. The player must enter the correct characters in the correct order.
fill-blanks-lock.playerInfo: In order to solve this puzzle, players can use the context of the puzzle to fill in the blanks. You can also provide them with hints or instructions on how to solve it.

solution.label: Solution
solution.notes: The solution to the fill in the blanks lock. This should be the full complete text with the blanks filled in.
solution.placeholder: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

text.label: Text
text.notes: The text with the blanks that the player must fill in. Use underscores to represent the blanks.
text.placeholder: The _____ brown fox jumps ____ the ____ dog.

mosaic-lock.name: Mosaic
mosaic-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to complete a mosaic puzzle to unlock the document. The player must click on the tiles to rotate them and complete the image.
mosaic-lock.playerInfo: No outside context is needed to solve this puzzle, players can simply rotate the tiles until the image is complete.

mosaicImage.label: Mosaic Image
mosaicImage.notes: The image that the player must complete. It's recommended to use a square image for best results.

mosaicSize.label: Mosaic Size
mosaicSize.notes: The number of rows and columns in the mosaic.

sound-lock.name: Melody
sound-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to listen to a melody and enter the correct note sequence to unlock the document.
sound-lock.playerInfo: While no outside context is needed to solve this puzzle, players will need to have a good ear for music to solve it. Players more familiar with music theory will have an easier time solving this puzzle.

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.notes: The sequence of notes that the player must enter to unlock the document. Each note should be separated by a comma. You can use the following notes: C, C#, D, D#, E, F, F#, G, G#, A, A#, B. You can also use the following notation to increase or decrease the octave: +C, -C, ++A, --B. To set a custom duration per note (in milliseconds) you can use the following notation: C500, D#1000.

chordDuration.label: Duration
chordDuration.notes: The duration of each note in milliseconds.

pauseBetweenNotes.label: Pause Between Notes
pauseBetweenNotes.notes: The duration of the pause between each note in milliseconds.

fifteen-lock.name: Sliding Tiles
fifteen-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to solve a sliding puzzle to unlock the document. The player must slide the tiles to form the correct image. The empty tile needs to be in the bottom right corner to unlock the document.
fifteen-lock.playerInfo: No outside context is needed to solve this puzzle, players can simply slide the tiles until the image is complete.

image.label: Image
image.notes: The image that the player must form by sliding the tiles. It's recommended to use a square image for best results.

size.label: Grid
size.notes: The number of rows and columns in the sliding puzzle.

four-by-four-lock.name: Pawns and Stars
four-by-four-lock.description: A lock that requires the player place pawns on a grid to form a specific pattern. Certain cells contain stars that must be covered by pawns, the amount of stars that needs to be covered is specified below and depends on the grid size. Every row and column must contain exactly the number of pawns indicated on the column or row headers.
four-by-four-lock.playerInfo: If Stars are enabled, players will need an hint to know how many stars they need to cover. Otherwise, it's possible to solve the puzzle without any external information.

pawnImage.label: Pawn Image
pawnImage.notes: The image that represents the pawns.

starImage.label: Star Image
starImage.notes: The image that represents the stars.

noStars.label: Ignore Stars
noStars.notes: If checked, the stars will be removed and the player only needs to place the pawns in the correct positions.

gridSize.label: Grid Size
gridSize.notes: The number of rows and columns in the grid.

puzzleGrid.label: Puzzle Grid
puzzleGrid.notes: The puzzle grid. Please follow the syntax of a generated puzzle if you want to create your own. This shows the solved state, where 0 is an empty cell, 1 is a pawn, and 2 is a star and 3 is a pawn on a star.

match-lock.name: Word/Image Match
match-lock.description: A lock that requires the player to match words to unlock the document. If a secret word is set, the incorrect letters will be stroked out and the remaining letters will form the secret word. In this case, the players must enter the secret word to unlock the document.
match-lock.playerInfo: In order to solve this puzzle, players can use the context of the puzzle to match the words. You can also provide them with hints or instructions on how to solve it.

matchTable.label: Match Table
matchTable.notes:
The table that contains the words to match, you can also use image paths instead of words. The first column is the words to match, the second column is the words to match with. Each word pair should be separated by a '|' (pipe) character.
The left column will be displayed as written, the right column will be shuffled.

secretWord.label: Secret Word
secretWord.notes: If set, random letters will be scattered around the center area of the puzzle, once the player has matched the words correctly, the incorrect letters will be stroked out and the remaining letters will form the secret word.

dictionary.label: Dictionary
dictionary.notes: The dictionary that will be used for the random letters.

pick-lock.name: Pick Lock
pick-lock.description: A Skyrim-inspired lockpicking system. The player must pick all pins by finding their sweet spots and applying tension.
pick-lock.playerInfo: Use the pick to rotate the lock and find the sweet spots for each pin. Apply tension to set the pins.
pick-lock.title: Pick Lock

f-cerradura-2.name: F Lock 2
f-cerradura-2.description: Oblivion-based lockpicking system. Lift each pin to its correct height while maintaining proper tension.
f-cerradura-2.playerInfo: Select a pin and use the mouse to move the pick and find the sweet spot. Maintain the correct tension.
f-cerradura-2.title: F Lock 2

jingle-bells-lock.name: Musical Bells
jingle-bells-lock.description: A lock that requires playing a sequence of notes in the correct order to unlock.
jingle-bells-lock.playerInfo: Listen carefully or follow the clues to play the correct melody.

sequence.label: Solution Sequence
sequence.notes: Note names separated by commas (e.g. Do, Mi, Re). Case insensitive.

energy-circuit-lock.name: Energy Circuit
energy-circuit-lock.description: A hacking puzzle where you must rotate nodes to restore power flow.
energy-circuit-lock.playerInfo: Rotate the pieces to connect the power Source (S) to the Terminal (E) before time runs out.

gridSize.label: Grid Size
gridSize.notes: The size of the board (e.g. 5 for a 5x5 grid).

timeLimit.label: Time Limit
timeLimit.notes: Time in seconds to solve the puzzle before it resets.

notifications.noLock: A lock has not been set on this document.
notifications.noLockSelected: No lock type has been selected.
notifications.noGM: A GM is required to unlock this document.
notifications.locked: This document is locked. As a GM you are able to open it normally.
